style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#fad9d5;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">docker stop node_d</span></font>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">HealthMonitor fires onFailure("node-d")</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="390" x="60" y="1740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Consumer calls GET /consume/order_1</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="390" x="60" y="1900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 18px;">Consumer receives:&nbsp;</span></font><span style="font-size: 18px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">{ payload: {...}, servedBy: "node-a", source: "primary", failover: true }</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="860" x="60" y="2090" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="1650" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160.53" y="1740" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(15 seconds pass — 3 health checks fail)</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="340" x="180" y="1680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">promotedNodes.set("node-d", null)&nbsp;</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">markFailedOver("node-d")</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="545" x="180" y="1820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="5" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="158.95" y="1790" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="159.48" y="1880" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 16px;">Ring says primary = node-d, replicas = [node-a, node-b]&nbsp;</font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">coordinator resolves effective primary as first healthy replica</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">GET http://node-a:5000/fetch/order_1</span></font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">node-a has the data (replicated at write time)</span></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="545" x="170" y="1980" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;entryX=0.115;entryY=-0.002;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="6" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="159.89999999999998" y="1950" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="158.95" y="2060" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.font: Ring says primary = node-d, replicas = [node-a, node-b]

font.span: coordinator resolves effective primary as first healthy replica
node-a has the data (replicated at write time)
